# Deployment Checklist Template

## 🎯 Overview

Comprehensive checklist để ensure smooth deployment của projects created với AI Automation Platform. Checklist này covers từ pre-deployment preparation đến post-deployment monitoring.

---

## 📋 Pre-Deployment Checklist

### ✅ Code & Build Quality
- [ ] **Code Review Completed**
  - All code reviewed by at least 2 team members
  - Security vulnerabilities addressed
  - Performance optimizations implemented
  - Vietnamese localization verified

- [ ] **Testing Complete**
  - Unit tests: >90% coverage achieved
  - Integration tests: All API endpoints tested
  - E2E tests: Critical user journeys verified
  - Performance tests: Load testing completed
  - Vietnamese user flow testing passed

- [ ] **Build Process**
  - Production build successful
  - Assets optimized (images, CSS, JS)
  - Environment variables configured
  - Database migrations ready

### ✅ Infrastructure Setup
- [ ] **Hosting Environment**
  - Production servers provisioned
  - SSL certificates installed
  - CDN configured for Vietnamese users
  - Database backups automated
  - Monitoring tools installed

- [ ] **Domain & DNS**
  - Domain registered and configured
  - DNS records pointing correctly
  - Vietnamese domain considerations (.vn)
  - Email forwarding setup

### ✅ Security Configuration
- [ ] **Authentication & Authorization**
  - User authentication working
  - Role-based permissions configured
  - API security implemented
  - Session management secure

- [ ] **Data Protection**
  - Data encryption at rest
  - HTTPS enforced
  - Vietnamese data compliance verified
  - Backup encryption enabled

---

## 🚀 Deployment Process

### ✅ Database Deployment
- [ ] **Database Setup**
  - Production database created
  - Schema migrations applied
  - Initial data seeded
  - Vietnamese text indexing configured
  - Backup verification completed

### ✅ Application Deployment
- [ ] **Frontend Deployment**
  - Static assets uploaded to CDN
  - Environment variables set
  - Vietnamese language files included
  - Mobile responsiveness verified

- [ ] **Backend Deployment**
  - API services deployed
  - Health checks responding
  - Database connections working
  - Third-party integrations active

### ✅ Vietnamese Integrations
- [ ] **Payment Gateways**
  - VNPAY integration tested
  - MoMo wallet working
  - ZaloPay configured
  - Banking integration verified

- [ ] **Communication Services**
  - Vietnamese SMS service active
  - Email templates in Vietnamese
  - Zalo integration working
  - Facebook integration tested

---

## 🧪 Post-Deployment Testing

### ✅ Functional Testing
- [ ] **Core Features**
  - User registration/login working
  - Main application flows tested
  - Payment processing verified
  - Email notifications sending

- [ ] **Vietnamese Specific**
  - Vietnamese text display correct
  - Currency formatting (VNĐ) working
  - Date/time in Vietnamese format
  - Local phone number validation

### ✅ Performance Testing
- [ ] **Speed & Performance**
  - Page load times <2 seconds
  - API response times <200ms
  - Database queries optimized
  - CDN serving Vietnamese users

- [ ] **Mobile Testing**
  - Responsive design working
  - Touch interface functional
  - Vietnamese keyboard support
  - Popular Vietnamese devices tested

---

## 📊 Monitoring Setup

### ✅ Application Monitoring
- [ ] **Health Monitoring**
  - Uptime monitoring active
  - Error tracking configured
  - Performance monitoring enabled
  - Vietnamese user experience tracked

- [ ] **Analytics Setup**
  - Google Analytics configured
  - Vietnamese user behavior tracking
  - Conversion tracking active
  - Business metrics collection

### ✅ Alerting Configuration
- [ ] **Critical Alerts**
  - Server downtime alerts
  - Payment failure notifications
  - Security incident alerts
  - Vietnamese business hours coverage

---

## 📞 Support Readiness

### ✅ Documentation
- [ ] **User Documentation**
  - User guides in Vietnamese
  - FAQ section prepared
  - Video tutorials ready
  - Troubleshooting guides available

- [ ] **Technical Documentation**
  - API documentation updated
  - Deployment guides ready
  - Troubleshooting procedures
  - Maintenance schedules defined

### ✅ Support Team
- [ ] **Team Preparation**
  - Support team trained
  - Vietnamese language support ready
  - Escalation procedures defined
  - Contact information published

---

## 🎯 Go-Live Approval

### ✅ Stakeholder Sign-off
- [ ] **Business Approval**
  - Product owner approval
  - Marketing team ready
  - Sales team informed
  - Legal compliance verified

- [ ] **Technical Approval**
  - Technical lead sign-off
  - Security team approval
  - DevOps team ready
  - Monitoring team prepared

### ✅ Launch Preparation
- [ ] **Communications**
  - Launch announcement prepared
  - User communication ready
  - Press release (if applicable)
  - Social media posts scheduled

- [ ] **Marketing**
  - Landing pages updated
  - SEO optimization complete
  - Vietnamese market campaign ready
  - Local influencer outreach prepared

---

## 🚀 Launch Day Activities

### ✅ Launch Execution
- [ ] **Final Checks**
  - All systems green
  - Team on standby
  - Rollback plan ready
  - Communication channels open

- [ ] **Go-Live Steps**
  - DNS cutover executed
  - SSL certificates verified
  - CDN cache cleared
  - Monitoring alerts active

### ✅ Post-Launch Monitoring
- [ ] **Immediate Monitoring**
  - Traffic levels normal
  - Error rates acceptable
  - Payment processing working
  - Vietnamese users accessing successfully

---

## 📈 Success Metrics

### ✅ Technical Metrics
- [ ] **Performance Targets**
  - 99.9% uptime achieved
  - <2s page load times
  - <200ms API response times
  - Zero critical errors

### ✅ Business Metrics
- [ ] **User Engagement**
  - Vietnamese user registrations
  - Feature adoption rates
  - Payment completion rates
  - Customer satisfaction scores

---

*Deployment checklist này ensures comprehensive preparation và successful launch. Customize based on specific project requirements!* 🚀
